publishedAbstract: * CSI pods unable to start on Infra nodes while deploying OCS 4.2 * CSI pods are stuck in `Pending` state while deploying OCS with the following message: ~~~ "Warning FailedScheduling 38s (x20 over 16m) default-scheduler 0/11 nodes are available: 11 node(s) didn't match node selector." ~~~
publishedTitle: CSI pods are unable to start on Infra nodes while deploying OCS 4.2
